query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscription_invoices` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `stripeInvoiceId` VARCHAR(128) UNIQUE,
  `stripeSubscriptionId` VARCHAR(128),
  `stripePaymentIntentId` VARCHAR(128),
  `amountDueCents` INT NOT NULL,
  `amountPaidCents` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `currency` VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'usd',
  `siDescription` TEXT,
  `siInvoiceType` ENUM('subscription','ai_credits','user_addon','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'subscription',
  `siStatus` ENUM('draft','open','paid','void','uncollectible','overdue') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  `siPeriodStart` BIGINT,
  `siPeriodEnd` BIGINT,
  `siDueDate` BIGINT,
  `siPaidAt` BIGINT,
  `siVoidedAt` BIGINT,
  `invoicePdfUrl` VARCHAR(512),
  `hostedInvoiceUrl` VARCHAR(512),
  `siNotes` TEXT,
  `createdAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `payment_methods` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `stripePaymentMethodId` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  `stripeCustomerId` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  `brand` VARCHAR(32),
  `last4` VARCHAR(4),
  `expMonth` INT,
  `expYear` INT,
  `isDefault` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `createdAt` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `feature_usage_tracking` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `featureKey` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  `usageCount` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lastUsedAt` BIGINT,
  `firstUsedAt` BIGINT,
  `updatedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY `tenant_feature_unique` (`tenantCompanyId`, `featureKey`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `trial_health_scores` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `healthScore` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `engagementLevel` ENUM('hot','warm','cold','at_risk','churned') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cold',
  `featuresUsedCount` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalFeatures` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `lastLoginAt` BIGINT,
  `daysSinceLastLogin` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `trialDaysRemaining` INT,
  `assignedAccountManagerId` INT,
  `lastContactedAt` BIGINT,
  `callOutcome` VARCHAR(256),
  `thsNotes` TEXT,
  `updatedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `trial_email_log` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `campaignType` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `sentAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `recipientEmail` VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  `subject` VARCHAR(512),
  `opened` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `clicked` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `shipments` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `shipmentType` ENUM('inbound','outbound') NOT NULL,
  `referenceNumber` VARCHAR(128),
  `shipStatus` ENUM('pending','ordered','in_transit','out_for_delivery','delivered','received','exception','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `supplierId` INT,
  `customerId` INT,
  `contactId` INT,
  `dealId` INT,
  `carrierName` VARCHAR(256),
  `trackingNumber` VARCHAR(256),
  `carrierService` VARCHAR(128),
  `shipDate` BIGINT,
  `expectedDelivery` BIGINT,
  `actualDelivery` BIGINT,
  `shipDescription` TEXT,
  `weight` VARCHAR(64),
  `dimensions` VARCHAR(128),
  `quantity` INT,
  `originAddress` TEXT,
  `destinationAddress` TEXT,
  `bolUrl` VARCHAR(512),
  `packingListUrl` VARCHAR(512),
  `shipNotes` TEXT,
  `createdAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ar_invoices` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `arInvoiceNumber` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `arCustomerId` INT,
  `arContactId` INT,
  `arDealId` INT,
  `arStatus` ENUM('draft','sent','viewed','partial','paid','overdue','void') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `arIssueDate` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `arDueDate` BIGINT,
  `arPaidDate` BIGINT,
  `arLineItems` JSON,
  `arSubtotalCents` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `arTaxRatePct` VARCHAR(16),
  `arTaxAmountCents` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `arTotalCents` INT NOT NULL,
  `arAmountPaidCents` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `arBalanceDueCents` INT NOT NULL,
  `arPaymentTerms` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'Net 30',
  `arNotes` TEXT,
  `arPdfUrl` VARCHAR(512),
  `arSentAt` BIGINT,
  `createdAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ap_bills` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantCompanyId` INT NOT NULL,
  `apBillNumber` VARCHAR(64),
  `apVendorId` INT,
  `apContactId` INT,
  `apStatus` ENUM('draft','pending','approved','partial','paid','overdue','void') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `apIssueDate` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `apDueDate` BIGINT,
  `apPaidDate` BIGINT,
  `apLineItems` JSON,
  `apSubtotalCents` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `apTaxAmountCents` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `apTotalCents` INT NOT NULL,
  `apAmountPaidCents` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `apBalanceDueCents` INT NOT NULL,
  `apCategory` VARCHAR(128),
  `apNotes` TEXT,
  `apAttachmentUrl` VARCHAR(512),
  `createdAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL
);
